docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-04-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AT&T CORP.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,333.78 FILED BY AFGE LOCAL 1216 AS TO DEFENDANT AT&T CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CT CORP SYSTEM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AFGE LOCAL 1216 AS TO DEFENDANT AT&T CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-20-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. "CONTINUED TRIAL--DEFENDANT HAS RESOLVED PLAINTIFF'S ISSUES. ON CALENDAR TO CONFIRM RESOLUTION", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL J. SANCHEZ--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ELLEN VANHOLE--MOBILITY SALES EXECUTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF AFGE LOCAL 1216
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMATION FILED BY DEFENDANT AT&T CORP.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AT&T CORP.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
